task.title: Setting bidirectional conversion support for z/OS UNIX System Services
task.shortdesc: z/OS UNIX files that contain bidirectional data must use bidirectional conversion tables to perform code page conversion for correctly transferring bidirectional data between the z/OS system and the workstation.

taskbody.context:
You can use three methods to specify these options:
You can use a bidirectional conversion table specific to the current resource.
You can inherit the bidirectional settings from a parent resource.
You can use manual bidirectional settings. Editing a remote C/C++ resource that has bidirectional conversion options causes the following message to open: You are trying to open a bidirectional file in Remote C/C++ Editor. The z Systems LPEX Editor is the recommended editor for proper handling of bidirectional files.

steps-unordered.stepsection: Do one of the following tasks:

step.cmd: To apply a bidirectional conversion table to a z/OS UNIX file or folder, do these steps:

substep.cmd: In the Remote Systems view, right-click a z/OS UNIX file or folder under a z/OS connection.
Click Bidirectional Settings in the list on the left.
Select the Use bidirectional conversion checkbox.
substep.stepresult: This option enables the remaining fields on the window. If the current resource cannot inherit bidirectional properties from a parent (because, for example, the parent resource does not use bidirectional conversion) the Resource inherits attributes from a parent button remains disabled.

substep.cmd: Click OK to apply the changes.

step.cmd: To inherit bidirectional settings, do these steps:

substep.cmd: Click Resource inherits attributes from a parent.
Click OK to apply the changes.

step.cmd: To specify bidirectional settings for the resource, click Resource has its own set of bidirectional attributes.
step.info: You can specify bidirectional attributes by using a bidirectional conversion table or by using manual settings:

choices.choice:
To use a bidirectional conversion table, do these steps:
Click Bidirectional Conversion Table. This option enables the field and the Browse and New buttons.
Enter the name of a bidirectional conversion file you created, or click Browse to look for and select a conversion file or New to create a table. Click OK to apply the changes.
To use manual bidirectional settings, click Manual Settings. Click OK to apply the changes.
